nodes.name: Brown-crested flycatcher
nodes.summary: Brown-crested flycatcher（Brown-crested flycatcher，学名 Myiarchus tyrannulus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于次生林、Gallery forest，常见栖息地包括沼泽、灌丛、稀树草原。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: From southern Mexico south it also occurs in tropical deciduous forest, secondary forest, swamp forest, gallery forest, and pine woodlands

links.evidence: From southern Mexico south it also occurs in tropical deciduous forest, secondary forest, swamp forest, gallery forest, and pine woodlands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: From southern Mexico south it also occurs in tropical deciduous forest, secondary forest, swamp forest, gallery forest, and pine woodlands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: brachyurus inhabits more open landscapes including pastures with scattered trees, scrublands, the edges of continuous forest, and mangrove swamps
